_readme: Israeli bank catalog for profile bank-details autocomplete. Static, bundled — no runtime external dependency (a broken third-party API must never break profile editing). Codes are the official Bank of Israel clearing codes. `branches` is per-bank and MAY be empty — the UI supports free typing when a branch isn't listed. To extend: add branch objects { code, name, city } under the bank, or regenerate from the Bank of Israel open dataset (data.gov.il 'snifim') and keep this file's shape.
